narrative:
Troy City has 18,622 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.9 percentage points.
